info.title: Federated Learning API
info.description: API documentation for the Medical AI Federated Learning platform.

get.summary: List all AI models

post.summary: Register a new AI model record

get.summary: Show a single AI model with FL round history

delete.summary: Delete a model (blocked if it has completed predictions)

post.summary: Activate a model and deactivate all others
Deactivate a model

get.summary: List audit logs with filtering
Show details of a single audit log entry
Platform-wide KPI cards for the admin dashboard header
User growth per month (last 12 months)
Organization type distribution
Organization approval status breakdown
Predictions per month (last 12 months)
Luminal-A vs Non-Luminal-A classification results
Patient age distribution – histogram buckets
Receptor status breakdown across all patients
AI model performance over FL rounds
Top organizations by number of predictions made
List all organizations with filtering and pagination

post.summary: Create a new organization (admin can do this directly)

get.summary: Show a single organization with full details

delete.summary: Delete an organization (cascades on DB level)

post.summary: Approve a pending organization and activate it
Reject a pending organization
Suspend an active organization

get.summary: List all users platform-wide with filtering

post.summary: Create a user directly (admin bypass, activated immediately)

get.summary: Show a single user

post.summary: Activate a user account
Deactivate a user account (soft-lock)
Handle Chargily Pay Webhook
post.description: Public endpoint for Chargily to push payment status updates. Secured by HMAC signature.

get.summary: List examinations created by this doctor

post.summary: Open a new examination for a patient

403.description: Patient does not belong to your organization

get.summary: Show a single examination with all related data

403.description: Not authorized to access this examination

put.summary: Update examination notes/complaint (only while in draft/submitted state)

422.description: Only draft examinations can be deleted

post.summary: Submit an examination (moves it from draft to submitted, ready for prediction)

422.description: Only draft examinations can be submitted

post.summary: Conclude an examination (doctor has reviewed the AI result and written their conclusion)

422.description: Can only be concluded after prediction

get.summary: KPI cards for the doctor's personal dashboard
My examinations per month (last 12 months)
My prediction results distribution (Lum-A vs Non-Lum-A)
Average confidence scores of my predictions
Patient age distribution for my patients
Recent activity feed – last 10 examinations
List patients belonging to this doctor's organization

post.summary: Register a new patient

get.summary: Show a patient with their full examination & prediction history

403.description: Not authorized to access this patient

put.summary: Update clinical data for a patient

delete.summary: Delete a patient record (only if they have no predictions)

422.description: Cannot delete a patient with prediction records

get.summary: List predictions made by this doctor (via their examinations)

post.summary: Dispatch an AI prediction for an examination
post.description: Packages clinical data + WSI, calls FastAPI, and stores the result as pending.

422.description: Examination not submitted / Prediction already exists

get.summary: Show a single prediction with XAI results

post.summary: Retry a failed prediction

422.description: Only failed predictions can be retried

get.summary: Poll the status of a prediction job
List reports authored by this doctor

post.summary: Create a draft report for a concluded examination

422.description: Examination not concluded or report already exists

get.summary: Show a single report with full context

post.summary: Finalize a report (marks it as official — no further edits allowed)
Attach a generated PDF file to the report

get.summary: List WSI uploads for the doctor's organization

post.summary: Upload a WSI file for a patient

get.summary: Show a single WSI upload record

delete.summary: Delete a WSI upload (only if no prediction has been made from it)

422.description: Cannot delete WSI with associated prediction

get.summary: Get the XAI result for a given prediction
get.description: Returns SHAP values, heatmap path, and top contributing features.

get.summary: List all contributions for a given FL round

post.summary: Record a contribution from an organization for a round

get.summary: List all FL rounds

post.summary: Open a new FL round for a given model

422.description: Active FL round already exists for this model

get.summary: Show a specific round with all organization contributions

post.summary: Complete an FL round and record the aggregated global accuracy

get.summary: FL platform KPI cards
Global accuracy across FL rounds
Contributions per organization per round
List all AI models

post.summary: Register a new model version

get.summary: Show a specific AI model with its FL round history

post.summary: Receive prediction results from FastAPI
post.description: Internal webhook for the FastAPI service to push prediction and XAI results back. Protected by a shared secret.

Show a single member

delete.summary: Remove a member from the organization

post.summary: Approve (activate) a pending doctor in this organization
Deactivate a member (suspend their access to this org)

get.summary: List all patients in this organization
Show a single patient with their examination history
List of available subscription plans

post.summary: Initiate a Chargily checkout for a plan
post.description: Creates a checkout session via Chargily API and returns the checkout URL.

get.summary: List payment history for this organization
Current subscription status

sanctum.description: HttpOnly cookie issued by Sanctum after a successful `/api/verify-otp` call.
